hero.name: Camila Arenas
hero.title: Fullstack Developer & AI Specialist
hero.description: From civil engineering to code: I build digital experiences with the same precision used to raise a building. Specialized in modern web development and artificial intelligence.

about.label: About me
about.title: From blueprints to pixels
about.description_1: My journey into tech started in civil engineering, where I learned to manage complex projects, solve problems under pressure, and deliver results with precision. That mindset is what I bring to every line of code.
about.description_2: Today I specialize in fullstack development with a growing focus on artificial intelligence. I believe the combination of engineering thinking and modern technology is the key to building digital products that truly make an impact.
about.description_3: Trained at Factoria F5, where I consolidated my technical skills through real-world projects using agile methodologies.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Send me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
